headline: Meta Lures Gen Z Talent With Six-Figure Salaries Amid Shrinking Job Opportunities — Here's How Much It's Offering
summary: Meta is reportedly offering hefty paychecks for entry-level software engineering roles, a move seen as a response to the challenging job market for recent graduates.

headline: Steve Wozniak's Favorite Steve Jobs Movie Was A 1999 Release That Never Made It To The Cinemas: Here's Why He Loved Watching It
summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) co-founder Steve Wozniak says Hollywood has captured Steve Jobs' best not in the splashy 2013 biopic starring Ashton Kutcher, "Jobs," but in a lower-profile 1999 made-for-TV film, "Pirates of Silicon Valley."

headline: Tesla, Palantir JPMorgan And More — Here's Why Investors Couldn't Stop Talking About These Stocks This Week
summary: Retail investors buzzed about five stocks this week, from Oct. 13 to Oct. 17 on X and Reddit's r/WallStreetBets: TSLA, RGTI, OKLO, JPM, PLTR

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks seeing strong interest during the week and a look at the potential catalysts.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Stellantis, Papa John's, Oklo — And Trade Tensions Shake Chip Stocks
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Samsung Chairman Jay Y Lee's Family Plans To Offload $1.2 Billion In Shares To Pay Massive $8 Billion Inheritance Tax
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. Ltd. (OTC: SSNLF) Chairman Jay Y Lee's mother and sisters plan to sell $1.2 billion worth of shares to cover a massive inheritance tax bill.

headline: Elon Musk Pay Deal Faces Pushback As ISS Tells Tesla Investors To Vote Against $1 Trillion Package
summary: Institutional Shareholder Services, one of the world's most influential proxy advisory firms, recommended that Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) shareholders vote against CEO Elon Musk's proposed compensation plan worth nearly $1 trillion.

headline: Meta, Blue Owl Strike $30 Billion Private Capital Deal For AI Data Center
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is nearing a $30 billion financing deal for its Hyperion data center in Richland Parish, Louisiana, which would be the largest private capital raise on record, according to a report published on Friday.

headline: Jensen Huang Says Nvidia Went From 95% Market Share To 0% In China: 'I Think It's A Mistake For US Not To...'
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the company's China market share has plunged from 95% to zero due to U.S. export restrictions, calling it a policy mistake that risks ceding one of the world's largest AI markets to domestic Chinese rivals.
